allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Me\\CODE\\Github\\SpringNodes"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse "_tests" -File | ForEach-Object { $mb = [math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\); $flag = if \($_.Length -gt 1048576\) { " LARGE" } else { "" }; $rflag = if \($_.Name -match '\\.\(rvt|rfa|rte|rft|sat\)$'\) { " REVIT/CAD" } else { "" }; if \($flag -or $rflag\) { Write-Host "${mb}MB`t$\($_.FullName\)$flag$rflag" } })

PowerShell($items = Get-ChildItem "C:\\Me\\CODE\\Github\\SpringNodes\\Nodes" -Recurse -File; Write-Host "Total files: $\($items.Count\)"; $items | Group-Object Extension | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Format-Table Name, Count)
